overview.description: The fundamentals First ETF (KNOW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an asset allocation fund that seeks income and capital appreciation by investing in equity and fixed income securities. The actively managed funds strategy focuses on fundamental investment research and analysis. KNOW was launched on Jan 26, 2024 and is issued by Mason Capital.
